title: Turing Scheme funding outcomes 2022 to 2023
body: "The outcomes of applications to the Turing Scheme for the 2022 to 2023 academic year, detailing the allocation of funds for international study and work placements to successful applicants.  The report provides an overview of the data broken down by various factors including:   nation demographic destination country   The allocations data spreadsheet provides a more detailed breakdown of the information.  The data includes both planned and actual use of the funding allocated.  "
